texto: I was dancing on the edge of something new, though maybe not completely new, if I had to be honest with myself, and I wasn't sure what I would do if I fell, if falling was an option, if falling was something I was actually meant to do all along.
explicacao: Citação de Cary Attwell sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I was dancing on the edge of something new, though maybe not completely new, if I had to be hones…” articula reflexao, falling-in-love, something em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
